---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or behaviour
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the user-visible problem. Concrete examples beat
abstractions.

## What would the ideal solution look like?

If you have an API in mind, sketch it. Otherwise describe the
shape of the answer.

## Alternatives you have considered

Workarounds you've tried, or other libraries that solve a similar
problem.

## Additional context

Links to relevant issues, papers, or upstream feature requests.
